subject: [OOM] Update Cassandra in common with service account
commit_message:
[OOM] Update Cassandra in common with service account

Add service account to requirements.yaml, values.yaml and
deployment/statefulset

Issue-ID: OOM-2703
Signed-off-by: farida azmy <farida.azmy.ext@orange.com>
Co-authored-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I226584b16b2cd1c22a4e71eb48ad95d974640006

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/909/ )

Patch Set 6: Code-Review-1

This is not going to work unless you add serviceAccount to PROCESSED_FIRST list in the makefile

Patch Set 6:

> Patch Set 6: Code-Review-1
> 
> This is not going to work unless you add serviceAccount to PROCESSED_FIRST list in the makefile

Like this:
PROCESSED_FIRST := repositoryGenerator readinessCheck certInitializer serviceAccount

Patch Set 6:

> Patch Set 6:
> 
> > Patch Set 6: Code-Review-1
> > 
> > This is not going to work unless you add serviceAccount to PROCESSED_FIRST list in the makefile
> 
> Like this:
> PROCESSED_FIRST := repositoryGenerator readinessCheck certInitializer serviceAccount

yep!
